query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_products FROM products; SELECT COUNT(*) as missing_images FROM products WHERE imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = ''; SELECT COUNT(*) as placeholder_images FROM products WHERE imageUrl LIKE '%placeholder%';
